text.title: Ai In Project Management — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org have DORA baseline + AI-decision documentation policy + PMBOK 8 alignment?

branch.when: dora_baseline_present == true AND ai_doc_policy_present == true AND pmbok8_aligned == true
branch.conclusion: Adopt the framework. Wire AI into observation+synthesis layers (risk scoring, digests). Never autonomous decisions.
Block. Establish DORA baseline first; AI optimisation without baseline cannot demonstrate improvement.
Block. Author AI-decision documentation policy first; AI-assisted decisions without traceability fail audit.
